title: Food Balance
description: Everyone deserve their own favorite foods.
body:
# 🍽️ Food Balance
*"Make every bite count."*  

Spice up your survival experience with **Food Balance** – a _vanilla-friendly datapack_ that redefines how food works, perfect for players who want **fresh mechanics** without drifting from the core Minecraft feel.

> Compatible with [Apple Enchant](https://modrinth.com/datapack/apple-enchant) and [Mooshroom Energy](https://modrinth.com/datapack/energy) for expanded food mechanics!

---

## Features

### Vanilla-Friendly
- Seamless integration into your world.
- No major gameplay changes.
- Only needs a **server-side install** for multiplayer!

### Unique Food Effects
- Every food has a purpose.
- No two items share the same effect.
- All foods are balanced — **no best food**.

### Buffed Forgotten Foods
- Useless items are no more!
- Formerly ignored foods now have **meaningful, fun mechanics**.

![Food Balance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb4c087364c90e6d9e0474d38d054b3c5e066e71.jpeg)

---

## Examples

- **Farming meals** grant **extra hearts** for half a Minecraft day.
- **Spider eyes** offer **Night Vision** and **Weaving**.
- **Rotten flesh** turns you **half-undead** — spooky!
- **Honey bottles** become your best friend in the mines.
- And finally... **Rabbit Stew** is worth crafting (and it’s HUGE)!

---
